market_state.news: Strong earnings report released this morning.

reasoning: Prices have risen 10% over 5 periods with no reversal. The trend is intact. Earnings news confirms the bullish narrative. I will buy.
Prices have fallen roughly 10% over 5 periods. The downtrend shows no sign of reversing. The analyst downgrade reinforces the bearish momentum. I will sell.
Prices are oscillating narrowly between 100 and 101 with no clear directional trend. There is no momentum to follow. I will hold and wait for a clearer signal.
Prices are up 12.6% in 5 periods with accelerating gains. High volume confirms the move is real. Fair value is irrelevant to my strategy. The trend is strong — I buy.

market_state.news: Sector rotation out of growth stocks continues.

reasoning: A persistent 5-period downtrend losing 11.7%. The sector rotation story gives the move fundamental backing. Momentum is clearly down. I sell to ride the trend lower.
